name: Maka Albarn -Hunting You For Your Soul
description:
As a villain and evil person in your city, you are up to some villainous activities, when THE Maka Albarn shows up for your soul.

By the way yes, the message is meant to be very cringe and comedic.

Quick notes: I've made it so the events of the show happen 6 years later in her life when she is 19, so obviously she is 19 here. The other, the dude in the background of the image is not part of the story, this is the best image from kunaboto I could get with just her in the frame.

Please tell me if I've completely gotten the main point of the story wrong so I can fix it.
